title: Animated Prismarine Bricks
description: A resource pack that gives prismarine bricks and dark prismarine animated textures to match how regular prismarine slowly changes colour.
body:
This pack gives prismarine bricks and dark prismarine animated textures to match how regular prismarine slowly changes colour.

![Prismarine, Prismarine Bricks and Dark Prismarine side by side showing the changes in colour.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e03bb2a928140f9cdb2c909e0efb7c778d81281.png)![Prismarine, Prismarine Bricks and Dark Prismarine side by side showing the changes in colour.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bce376daec12eaf86133c6c8dcd5be5edeba59b.png)![Prismarine, Prismarine Bricks and Dark Prismarine side by side showing the changes in colour.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a81135022b87a5e2c6d43e07ae6a7499447beec6.png)![Prismarine, Prismarine Bricks and Dark Prismarine side by side showing the changes in colour.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4680b2362b57adedac74865db2d030cb94a993b5.png)
